name: Simple Direct
text: Explain gradient descent in one paragraph.

name: Expert Tone
text: You are a machine learning expert. Explain gradient descent clearly and concisely.

name: Step by Step
text: Explain gradient descent step by step, numbering each step.

name: Analogy First
text: Use a simple real-world analogy to explain gradient descent to a complete beginner.

name: ELI5
text: Explain gradient descent like I am five years old.

name: Formal Academic
text: Provide a formal academic explanation of gradient descent, including its mathematical formulation.

name: Bullet Points
text: Explain gradient descent using only bullet points. Be concise.

name: Socratic
text: Use the Socratic method to explain gradient descent by posing and answering questions.

name: With Example
text: Explain gradient descent and provide a concrete numerical example with a simple function.

name: Visual Description
text: Describe gradient descent as if you were drawing it on a whiteboard, using spatial language.

name: Short Tweet
text: Explain gradient descent in 280 characters or fewer.

text: Provide an in-depth explanation of gradient descent covering variants like SGD, mini-batch, and adaptive methods.

name: For Kids
text: Explain gradient descent to a 10-year-old using a fun story or game analogy.

name: For a Manager
text: Explain gradient descent to a non-technical project manager in business terms.

name: Error Minimization Framing
text: Frame gradient descent as a strategy for minimizing errors and explain why it works.

name: Mountain Metaphor
text: Use the metaphor of descending a mountain in fog to explain gradient descent. Extend the metaphor as far as possible.

text: Compare gradient descent with Newton's method. Highlight when each is preferred.

text: Explain gradient descent with a brief history of who developed it and why it matters.

text: Explain gradient descent and include pseudocode for the basic algorithm.

name: Pros and Cons
